description:
As a new user
  I want to create an account and authenticate
  So that I can access the LLM inference application

steps.name: I don't have an existing account
I register with email "testuser@example.com" and password "ValidPass123!"
my account should be created successfully
I should receive a user ID
I should be able to login with those credentials
a user with email "existing@example.com" already exists
I attempt to register with email "existing@example.com" and password "ValidPass123!"
the error message should contain "already exists"
I don't have an existing account
I attempt to register with email "newuser@example.com" and password "weak"
a user with email "testuser@example.com" and password "ValidPass123!" exists
I login with email "testuser@example.com" and password "ValidPass123!"
I should receive an access token
the token should contain my user information
a user with email "testuser@example.com" and password "ValidPass123!" exists
I login with email "testuser@example.com" and password "WrongPassword123!"
the error message should contain "Invalid credentials"
I attempt to access a protected endpoint
a user with email "testuser@example.com" and password "ValidPass123!" exists

name: User Authentication

description:
As a system administrator
  I want to ensure data is validated correctly
  So that only valid data is accepted

steps.name: the validation result should be true
the validation result should be true
the validation result should be false
the validation result should be false
the validation result should be false
the validation result should be false

name: Data Validation
